title: Add "Make Editable" flag to updates
excerpt: I know many have an issue with the fact that only the author of an update can edit it. But I also understand how this limitation can be considered necessary unless an update edit tracking feature is in place. Which, woul…

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
I know many have an issue with the fact that only the author of an update can edit it. But I also understand how this limitation can be considered necessary unless an update edit tracking feature is in place. Which, would be great but also a significant change from a developer perspective.

This morning I had an idea. Add a flag, that only the creator (author, automation or API) can set that will explicitly grant others edit access for that update.

I think that this shouldn’t be too difficult and would provide a “next-level” advantage to using updates.

Jim - Subscribe to The Monday Man
